calendar.matters:
Mtn For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Aug-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Amswers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interogatorsies
Off Calendar May-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
